title: 關係代名詞 who / which / that（限定子句）

formulas.zh: 名詞＋關係代名詞(who/that)＋動詞...，用來修飾先行詞為人的情況
名詞＋關係代名詞(which/that)＋動詞...，用來修飾先行詞為物的情況

explanation: 關係代名詞引導形容詞子句，用來限定或補充說明先行詞。修飾人用 who 或 that；修飾物用 which 或 that。當關係代名詞在子句中作受詞時可省略。先行詞為 all、the only、最高級或序數詞時，習慣用 that 而非 which。形容詞子句提供必要資訊以區分先行詞，屬限定性修飾。

examples.eng: The student who won the competition is very intelligent and hardworking.
examples.chi: 贏得比賽的那位學生非常聰明且勤奮。

examples.eng: The book which you recommended last week is on the bestseller list now.
examples.chi: 你上週推薦的那本書現在在暢銷書榜單上。

examples.eng: All the teachers that work in our school are well-qualified and experienced.
examples.chi: 在我們學校任教的所有老師都是資深且合格的。

examples.eng: The only solution that can solve this problem requires careful planning and teamwork.
examples.chi: 唯一能解決這個問題的解決方案需要細心規劃和團隊合作。

extension.tip: 判斷先行詞性質決定關係代名詞：人用 who/that，物用 which/that。注意 that 可替代 who 和 which，但 who 和 which 不可互換。先行詞為 all、the only、最高級或不定代名詞時優先用 that。檢查關係代名詞在子句中的語法功能，作受詞可省略。

examples.test: The girl who/that studies hard will succeed. vs. The girl which studies hard will succeed.
examples.result: → 第一句正確。修飾人用 who 或 that，不能用 which。

examples.test: The book (that) you read is interesting. vs. The book that is interesting costs $20.
examples.result: → 第一句 that 可省（作受詞）；第二句 that 不能省（作主詞）。

examples.test: The best student that has ever attended this school is Mary. vs. The best student which has ever attended this school is Mary.
examples.result: → 第一句正確。先行詞為最高級時用 that 而非 which。

extension.note: 人用 who/that，物用 which/that；先行詞為 all/the only/最高級優先用 that；作受詞可省略。

parts: designed the bridge are very talented professionals.
exercises.sentence: The engineers who/that designed the bridge are very talented professionals.
exercises.translation: 設計那座橋的工程師們都是非常有才華的專業人士。

parts: we use today improves our daily lives significantly.
exercises.sentence: The technology that/which we use today improves our daily lives significantly.
exercises.translation: 我們今天使用的科術大大改善了我們的日常生活。

parts: participate in this program benefit from the experience.
exercises.sentence: All students that participate in this program benefit from the experience.
exercises.translation: 所有參與這個課程的學生都從中受益。

parts: young people face requires courage and determination to overcome.
exercises.sentence: The most difficult challenge that young people face requires courage and determination to overcome.
exercises.translation: 年輕人所面臨的最大挑戰需要勇氣和決心來克服。

vocab_table.zh: 可修飾人或物的關係代名詞
第一個／最後一個（常搭配 that）
形容詞子句提供必要資訊，不可省略逗號前的內容
形容詞子句提供補充資訊，前後有逗號（不適用此句型）
關係代名詞在子句中作受詞時可省略
關係代名詞在子句中作主詞時不可省略

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇合適的關係代名詞修飾先行詞 person
mc_exercises.question_eng: The person _______ helped us yesterday is a volunteer from the community center.
mc_exercises.explanation: 修飾人（person）用 who 作主詞。B 選項 which 用於修飾物不適用；C 選項 where 是地點副詞；D 選項 whom 用於作受詞的情況，此處 helped 需主詞，故 who 正確。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當的關係代名詞修飾先行詞 magazine
mc_exercises.question_eng: The magazine _______ you borrowed from the library contains interesting articles about climate change.
mc_exercises.explanation: 修飾物（magazine）用 which 或 that。此處 magazine 是 borrowed 的受詞，關係代名詞可省略或用 that。B 選項 who 用於修飾人；C 選項 where 為地點副詞；D 選項 what 為疑問詞，均不適用。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 在習慣用法下選擇適當的關係代名詞
mc_exercises.question_eng: The only solution _______ can solve this problem is to invest more money in research and development.
mc_exercises.explanation: 當先行詞為「the only」時，習慣用 that 而非 which。此處 the only solution 應搭配 that 引導限定子句。A 選項 which 在此上下文不符習慣用法；C、D 選項分別為地點副詞和疑問詞，不適用此文法結構。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 辨別限定與非限定子句，選擇正確關係代名詞與標點
mc_exercises.question_eng: The students _______ scored above 95 on the entrance exam, _______ represents the top 5% of all applicants, will receive scholarships.
mc_exercises.explanation: 第一空為限定子句修飾 students（人），用 who 或 that；第二空為非限定子句（已有逗號），修飾前面整個子句（物），用 which 不用 that，故用 who 和 which。A 選項第二空用 that 錯誤（非限定不用 that）；B、D 選項第一空用 that/which 修飾人不適；D 選項兩空皆錯。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我有一位老師，他總是很耐心地解答我們的問題。
translation_exercises.answer: I have a teacher who always patiently answers our questions.
key_points: 限定子句提供必要資訊區分老師
hints: 句型框架：N(人) + who + V...，who 在子句中作主詞
注意：修飾人用 who 或 that，此處用 who 最恰當；不能用 which

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 學校最近舉辦了一場運動會，吸引了許多學生參加。
translation_exercises.answer: The school recently held a sports day that attracted many students to participate.
key_points: a sports day (先行distintà詞，可用 that)
that attracted (關係代名詞 that 作主詞)
限定子句說明運動會的特徵
hints: 句型框架：N(物) + that + V...，that 在此作主詞；修飾物可用 which 或 that
提醒：用 that 而非 which 可使句子更簡潔；attracted 是過去式，因子句修飾單數名詞

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我最喜歡的電影是那部探討社會議題的電影。
translation_exercises.answer: My favorite movie is the one that explores social issues.
key_points: the one (先行詞為 the one，習慣用 that)
習慣用法：the only + n. 用 that
hints: 句型框架：N(物) + that + V...，先行詞為『the only』或『最高級』等限制詞時習慣用 that 不用 which
提醒：favorite 為最高級語境（我最喜歡），此時用 that 為習慣用法；也可說『the film that』但『the one that』更簡潔

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 班級裡有幾位同學，他們在準備大學入試，他們的努力值得尊敬。
translation_exercises.answer: There are several classmates in our class who are preparing for the university entrance exam, and their effort is admirable. / Several classmates (that) we have are preparing for the university entrance exam, whose effort is admirable.
key_points: who are preparing (who 作主詞，進行式表示進行中)
university entrance exam (高中生主要情境)
限定子句區分該批同學
hints: 句型框架：N(人) + who + V...，who 作主詞時不可省略；若關係代名詞作受詞可省略
提醒：進行式 are preparing 適合表現『正在準備』的狀態；避免與定語混淆，形容詞子句須有完整動詞；複雜句可用 whose 或逗點分句進行
